title: How Long?
description: See your total playtime by holding a clock
body:
![A minecraft player holding a clock to see their total playtime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b427a4c1ba2c60da9daf813ca73077c17a7343ac.png)
Are you also lazy to scroll through stats to check how long you've spent in your world/server? Now you can make it easier - just hold a clock and see your total play-time nicely formatted!
